title: After Sting Operation, Cousin of Bashar al-Assad Convicted in Arms for Drugs Deal
summary_full: The cousin, Antoine Kassis, was found guilty of conspiracy to support a terrorist group, after trying to sell weapons from the fallen regime to a Colombian militia.
summary_public: The cousin, Antoine Kassis, was found guilty of conspiracy to support a terrorist group, after trying to sell weapons from the fallen regime to a Colombian militia.
